'''旧暦3月22日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[大化]]2年（[[646年]]_月_日） - [[薄葬令]]発布。大規模な墓の建設や家来等を殉死させることを禁止 * （[[1379年]]_月_日） - 北朝が康暦に改元 * [[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]_月_日） - [[東京府]]が[[人力車]]の営業を許可
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月21日 (旧暦)|3月21日]] 翌日[[3月23日 (旧暦)|3月23日]] - 前月[[2月22日 (旧暦)|2月22日]] 翌月[[4月22日 (旧暦)|4月22日]] *新暦[[3月22日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.text:
'''March 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{出典の明記|date=2022年12月17日 (土) 10:43 (UTC)}}{{Lunar March}} ''March 22'''<!--Lunar March22--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[大化]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[646年]][[4月12日]]） - [[薄葬令]]発布。大規模な墓の建設や家来等を殉死させることを禁止 * [[康暦]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1379年]][[4月9日]]） - 北朝が[[永和 (日本)|永和]]から康暦に[[改元]] * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[4月22日]]） - [[東京府]]が[[人力車]]の営業を許可
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==

revision.text:
'''March 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{出典の明記|date=2022年12月17日 (土) 10:43 (UTC)}}{{Lunar March}} ''March 22'''<!--Lunar March22--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[大化]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[646年]][[4月12日]]） - [[薄葬令]]発布。大規模な墓の建設や家来等を殉死させることを禁止 * [[康暦]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1379年]][[4月9日]]） - 北朝が[[永和 (日本)|永和]]から康暦に[[改元]] * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[4月22日]]） - [[東京府]]が[[人力車]]の営業を許可
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}}) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}}) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}}) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}}.
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
---
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Era name changes]] [[Category:Transportation history]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:大化2年の出来事]]

revision.text:
[[sn:March 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}}) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}}) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}}) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}}.
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Japanese governmental policies]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:大化2年の出来事]]

[[sn:March 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Translated pages]] to [[Category:completion tier 5]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Japanese governmental policies]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[ja:大化2年の出来事]]

[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379年}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Japanese governmental policies]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[ja:大化2年の出来事]]
---

[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646年}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379th year }} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646th year }} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379th year }} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646th year }} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379th year }} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Japanese governmental policies]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[ja:大化2nd year の出来事]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] [[zh:三月廿二]] [[en:draft:March 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646th year }} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379th year }} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Japanese governmental policies]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[ja:大化2nd year の出来事]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|646|ja|646th year }} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379th year }} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車}} .

== Deaths ==

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Taika|ja|大化|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|646|ja|646th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=draft}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death.
* {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦|12=draft}} 1 / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1379|ja|1379th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日|12=draft}} ) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)|12=draft}} to Kōryaku.
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府|12=draft}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
---
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|646|ja|646年|12=draft}} {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=draft}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦|12=draft}} 1st year / {{ill|Tenjū (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1379|ja|1379年|12=draft}} {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日|12=draft}}) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和 (日本)|12=draft}} to {{ill|Kōryaku|ja|康暦|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870年|12=draft}} {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|ja|東京府|12=draft}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|rickshaws|ja|人力車|12=draft}}.

{{出典の明記|date=2022年12月17日 (土) 10:43 (UTC)}}{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月22日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[大化]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[646年]][[4月12日]]） - [[薄葬令]]発布。大規模な墓の建設や家来等を殉死させることを禁止 * [[康暦]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1379年]][[4月9日]]） - 北朝が[[永和 (日本)|永和]]から康暦に[[改元]] * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[4月22日]]） - [[東京府]]が[[人力車]]の営業を許可
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 22|qq=March 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|qq=}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|qq=}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839162]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 22|qq=March 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|qq=|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|qq=|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿二]][[zh:三月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839162]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 22|qq=March 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿二]][[zh:三月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839162]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 22|qq=March 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿二]]
{{translated page|ja|3月22日 (旧暦)|version=92939947|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿二]][[zh:三月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839162]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 22|qq=March 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿二]][[zh:三月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839162]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 22|qq=March 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿二]][[zh:三月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿二]][[zh:三月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿二]][[zh:三月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839162]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 22|qq=March 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:646|646]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]] 1st year / [[:en:Tenju|Tenjū (Japan)]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1379|1379]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – The Northern Court changes the era name from [[:en:Eiwa|Eiwa (Japan)]] to [[:en:Kōryaku|Kōryaku]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – The [[:en:Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)]] grants permission for the operation of [[:en:Pulled rickshaw|rickshaws]].
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|21|3|23|2|22|4|3|0322|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|WD=Q1077930|lt=Taika}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|646|en|646|WD=Q33285|lt=646}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * {{ill|Kōryaku|en|Kōryaku|WD=Q252777|lt=Kōryaku}} 1st year / {{ill|Tenju|en|Tenju|WD=Q1145023|lt=Tenjū (Japan)}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1379|en|1379|WD=Q6316|lt=1379}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa|en|Eiwa|WD=Q1145780|lt=Eiwa (Japan)}} to {{ill|Kōryaku|en|Kōryaku|WD=Q252777|lt=Kōryaku}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|WD=Q2526|lt=April 22}}) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|en|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|WD=Q1189121|lt=Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|Pulled rickshaw|en|Pulled rickshaw|WD=Q16337999|lt=rickshaws}}.

== Events == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|WD=Q1077930|lt=Taika}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|646|en|646|WD=Q33285|lt=646}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * {{ill|Kōryaku|en|Kōryaku|WD=Q252777|lt=Kōryaku}} 1st year / {{ill|Tenju|en|Tenju|WD=Q1145023|lt=Tenjū (Japan)}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1379|en|1379|WD=Q6316|lt=1379}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa|en|Eiwa|WD=Q1145780|lt=Eiwa (Japan)}} to {{ill|Kōryaku|en|Kōryaku|WD=Q252777|lt=Kōryaku}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|WD=Q2526|lt=April 22}}) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|en|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|WD=Q1189121|lt=Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|Pulled rickshaw|en|Pulled rickshaw|WD=Q16337999|lt=rickshaws}}.

== Events == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|WD=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|646|en|646|WD=Q33285|lt=646|1=646}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – The {{ill|Sōsōryō|ja|薄葬令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsōryō|1=Thin Burial Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11622174}} is issued, prohibiting the construction of large tombs and the practice of having retainers commit ritual suicide upon their lord’s death. * {{ill|Kōryaku|en|Kōryaku|WD=Q252777|lt=Kōryaku|1=Kōryaku}} 1st year / {{ill|Tenju|en|Tenju|WD=Q1145023|lt=Tenjū (Japan)|1=Tenju}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1379|en|1379|WD=Q6316|lt=1379|1=1379}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9|1=April 9}}) – The Northern Court changes the era name from {{ill|Eiwa|en|Eiwa|WD=Q1145780|lt=Eiwa (Japan)|1=Eiwa}} to {{ill|Kōryaku|en|Kōryaku|WD=Q252777|lt=Kōryaku|1=Kōryaku}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|WD=Q2526|lt=April 22|1=April 22}}) – The {{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|en|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|WD=Q1189121|lt=Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|1=Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)}} grants permission for the operation of {{ill|Pulled rickshaw|en|Pulled rickshaw|WD=Q16337999|lt=rickshaws|1=Pulled rickshaw}}.
